summary: Comprehensive testing of refactored Discipline OS completed. Major refactor from auth-gated MVP to guest-mode-first app. Backend: 3/3 quick tests passed (health, register, login). Frontend: All 18 new features tested and working. Onboarding flow, guest mode with AsyncStorage, Settings auth form, template flow, milestones - all functioning correctly.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow instead) - not critical, just deprecation warnings
Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' - not critical

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend: Health and auth endpoints working correctly
✅ Onboarding: Welcome screen loads first (no auth gate) - major refactor success
✅ Onboarding: Start screen with 3 options working correctly
✅ Onboarding: Template flow creates goal with milestones and completes onboarding
✅ Onboarding: Explore button completes onboarding and navigates to tabs
✅ Guest Mode: All CRUD operations working with AsyncStorage (goals, tasks, reminders)
✅ Guest Mode: Milestone add/toggle working locally
✅ Guest Mode: Task toggle working locally
✅ Home Dashboard: Quote, welcome state, progress cards, quick actions all working
✅ Tab Navigation: Home, Goals, Tasks, Settings tabs working
✅ Settings: 'Back up your data' card instead of login wall - refactor success
✅ Settings: Auth form expands, fills, toggles between login/register correctly
✅ Goals Tab: Premium empty state visible
✅ Tasks Tab: Premium empty state visible
✅ Paywall: Screen loads with monthly/yearly plans
✅ Goal Detail: Milestones add/toggle working in guest mode
✅ LocalStore: All AsyncStorage operations working correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (3/3 quick tests passed, full suite from iteration_1: 24/24)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - guest mode uses local AsyncStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactor completed successfully. App now opens with onboarding (no auth gate). Guest mode works perfectly with AsyncStorage. Auth moved to Settings as optional backup feature. All features tested and working. Only minor deprecation warnings in console (not affecting functionality). RevenueCat subscription is MOCKED using AsyncStorage.

onboarding_flow: ✅ Welcome screen loads as first screen (no auth wall)
✅ GET STARTED button navigates to Start screen
✅ Start screen shows 3 options: Create goal, Templates, Explore
✅ Template selection (Morning Routine) creates goal with 5 milestones
✅ Template selection completes onboarding and navigates to tabs
✅ Explore button completes onboarding and navigates to tabs
guest_mode: ✅ Create goal without signing in (stored in AsyncStorage)
✅ Create task without signing in (stored in AsyncStorage)
✅ Create reminder without signing in (stored in AsyncStorage)
✅ Toggle task completion in guest mode
✅ Add milestones to goal in guest mode
✅ Toggle milestone completion in guest mode
home_dashboard: ✅ Welcome state visible when no data
✅ Progress cards show: Tasks Done, Active Goals, Milestones
✅ Active goal card with progress bar
✅ Quick action buttons (Goal, Task, Reminder) all working
tab_navigation: ✅ Goals tab loads with premium empty state
✅ Tasks tab loads with premium empty state
✅ Settings tab loads with 'Back up your data' card
settings_screen: ✅ Shows 'Back up your data' card (not login wall)
✅ Auth form expands when card clicked
✅ Form has name, email, password fields
✅ Stats cards visible (streak, completions, goals, milestones)
✅ Upgrade to Pro button navigates to paywall

mocked_apis.description: RevenueCat subscription is MOCKED using AsyncStorage. Guest mode data stored locally in AsyncStorage.
mocked_apis.details: Subscription state stored locally. No real payment processing. Guest mode uses localStore.ts for all CRUD operations (goals, tasks, reminders, stats, quotes).

refactor_validation.description: This iteration validates the major refactor from auth-gated MVP to guest-mode-first app
changes_validated: ✅ Onboarding flow is now the first screen (no auth gate)
✅ Guest mode using AsyncStorage works for all features
✅ Auth moved to Settings as optional 'Back up your data' flow
✅ Premium empty states for Goals and Tasks tabs
✅ Template flow creates goals with milestones
